title: About Adams soul getting back into his body
display_title: About Adams soul getting back into his body
wikitext:
[]: About Adam's soul getting back into his body             Quote Post by TonyTH » Mon Nov 22, 2010 2:09 am So I'm actually here to share a theory this time as opposed to asking a question. I'm also aware you guys could of already talked about/solved this matter for all I know, but here it goes ; P So we all are aware that Adam's soul got back into it's body after Kaworu died. Nooot really so much on the how...had a thought while I was talking with some buddies about something... Rei was our little soul collector in EoE. A few people in pre-third impact saw her as well(Misato, Ritsuko). Guess who also saw her before a minute of silence and getting his head popped off? Perhaps Rei collected Kaworu's soul and put it back? Gendo could of ordered her too as well for all we know.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Nov 22, 2010 4:49 am I never really put much thought into that... I was too busy thinking "WTF, there's a GNK growing out of GNR's hips!" I suppose your theory sounds reasonable enough, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Nov 22, 2010 5:08 am I think the most accepted explanation is that Kaworu's soul ended up back in the embryo in Gendo's hand after he was killed (Adam's soul, Adam's body). The embryo when into Rei in EoE. Rei returned to Lilith and now we have Kaworu appearing out of Lilith. The Rei soul collecting thing has a few kinks in it, as souls weren't collected at all until Shinji said he wanted everyone to die, and that was after Kaworu appeared out of Lilith (Rei). When the soul leaves, no AT Field to hold the shape of the body so they all turn into LCL; this is an important point. Rei apparitions appeared before Misato and Ritsuko at the times of their deaths, but this happens before Shinji said he wanted everyone to die: Later on, we see that Ritsuko didn't turn into LCL, she's still floating around, implying that her soul hasn't left the body yet: Much later, after 3rd impact is started and we see Rei's going around collecting souls and leaving puddles of LCL, NOW we see her collect Misato's and Ritsuko's souls: So the soul collecting happens after Kaworu pops out of Rei/Lilith. Although it's possible there's some special case with Rei collecting Kaworu's soul specifically and that he's an Angel or whatever, and there's really no explanation on how Kaworu's soul ended up in the embryo, it still seems like the Kaworu's soul -> embryo -> Rei -> Lilith is the most straightfoward.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Nov 22, 2010 10:08 am That's the real Rei in Terminal Dogma, not a phantom soul-collecting Rei. Adam's soul went into the embryo the same way Rei 2's soul went into Rei 3; Nerv took it out of the old body and placed it into the new body.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:20 pm No, Rei was stark naked at the time. These are all phantoms. Either Gendo returned Kaworu's soul to the embryo in his hand or he fished it out of Kaworu's remains in the LCL lake and placed it in Lilith. Or maybe it was just floating around, and was sucked into the sequence of events by Rei-Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by lilim » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:47 pm why would Gendo put Adam's soul into Lilith? i agree that the Kaworu's soul -> embryo -> Rei -> Lilith thing makes the most sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Mon Nov 22, 2010 12:59 pm lilim wrote: why would Gendo put Adam's soul into Lilith?

[]:             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Nov 22, 2010 1:08 pm Maybe Adam's soul returned to its proper place -- Adam's body -- by its own, because there's a natural, unbreakable bond between each body and soul. There were no constrictions, either Kaworu's body or an AT. Field, that can hinder this reunion.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 22, 2010 1:52 pm UrsusArctos wrote: and placed it in Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Mon Nov 22, 2010 2:38 pm UrsusArctos wrote: No, Rei was stark naked at the time. These are all phantoms. Either Gendo returned Kaworu's soul to the embryo in his hand or he fished it out of Kaworu's remains in the LCL lake and placed it in Lilith. Or maybe it was just floating around, and was sucked into the sequence of events by Rei-Lilith.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Nov 22, 2010 6:14 pm I always assumed returning Adam's soul to it's vessel was a necessity to use it's full power, otherwise Gendo could've cut out Rei and merged with Lilith himself, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Nov 22, 2010 6:20 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Ornette wrote: Rei apparitions appeared before Misato and Ritsuko at the times of their deaths, but this happens before Shinji said he wanted everyone to die:

[]: Re: About Adam's soul getting back into his body             Quote Post by skikes » Mon Nov 22, 2010 9:54 pm TonyTH wrote: So I'm actually here to share a theory this time as opposed to asking a question. I'm also aware you guys could of already talked about/solved this matter for all I know, but here it goes ; P So we all are aware that Adam's soul got back into it's body after Kaworu died. Nooot really so much on the how...had a thought while I was talking with some buddies about something... Rei was our little soul collector in EoE. A few people in pre-third impact saw her as well(Misato, Ritsuko). Guess who also saw her before a minute of silence and getting his head popped off? Perhaps Rei collected Kaworu's soul and put it back? Gendo could of ordered her too as well for all we know.

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Nov 23, 2010 11:20 am ^ No, that's Rei 3, she's there to find out the truth about Kaworu, and herself. The plot doesn't flow properly otherwise.
summary: []: About Adam's soul getting back into his body             Quote Post by TonyTH » Mon Nov 22, 2010 2:09 am So I'm actually here to share a theory this time as opposed to asking a question. I'm also aware you guys could of already talked about/solved this matter for all I know, but here it goes ; P So we all are aware that Adam's soul got back into it's body after Kaworu died. Nooot really so much on the how...had a thought
